corrections.current: ἐκ τοῦ ἄνθους τῆς ῥίζης αὐτῆς
corrections.correct: ἐκ τοῦ ἀνθοῦς τῆς ῥίζης αὐτῆς
corrections.note: Printed text has ἀνθοῦς, not ἄνθους.
Neuter plural accusative printed as σκεύη, not singular/plural-mismatched σκεύος.
Body was misread from the image; printed text reads ῥαδιεῖται.
Printed body has συνλήψεται; transcript added an extra μ from apparatus variants.

notes: Running head matches. Apparatus appears correctly transcribed. Left-margin line numbers 6–15 are present in the transcript as page-line indicators, not treated as verse numbers.
